Class OrderStatus

java.lang.Object
com.sait.workshop05.util.OrderStatus
public final class OrderStatus extends Object
Shared status constants keep desktop labels aligned with API values.

    • ALL_STATUSES

    • STAFF_ASSIGNABLE_STATUSES

      public static final List<String> STAFF_ASSIGNABLE_STATUSES
      Status values staff may PATCH directly. Completed remains server-driven through customer confirmation or automatic flows.

      public static final List<String> FILTER_STATUSES
      Statuses for filter dropdowns including the All option.
